scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const dist='dist';const files=['index.html','assam_highway_map_with_districts_highlighted.png','gis2_road_1.jpg','gis2_road_2.jpg','gis2_road_3.avif'];fs.rmSync(dist,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync(dist,{recursive:true});files.forEach(function(f){if(fs.existsSync(f)){fs.copyFileSync(f,path.join(dist,f));}});console.log('Build complete: dist with index and GIS assets');"
